scripts.preinstall: sh -c 'rm -f package-lock.json yarn.lock; case "$npm_config_user_agent:$npm_execpath" in pnpm/*:*|*:*/pnpm|*:*/pnpm.cjs|*:*/pnpm.mjs|*:*/pnpm/bin/*) ;; *) echo "Use pnpm instead" >&2; exit 1 ;; esac'
scripts.build: pnpm run typecheck && pnpm -r --if-present run build
scripts.typecheck: pnpm run typecheck:libs && pnpm -r --filter "./artifacts/**" --filter "./scripts" --if-present run typecheck
scripts.dev: echo "Run in two terminals: pnpm dev:api  and  pnpm dev:app"
